name: Jones, Marshall
resolved_employer: Operations Manager, Sunday Lunchbox (Austin food-justice nonprofit / 501(c)(3), member of Greater Austin Black Chamber)
evidence: Sunday Lunchbox is an Austin 501(c)(3) improving healthy-food access; a 'T. Marshall Jones' has an Austin about.me profile tied to local food ventures. Occupation/employer on the filing match the nonprofit, but no page names him by role.

name: Eichler, Shera
resolved_employer: Government-relations/political consultant; principal of Purple Sage Strategies LLC and co-founder of Second Floor Strategies (with former TX House Speaker Dennis Bonnen)
evidence: Shera Kutac Eichler was longtime lead staffer for GOP Speaker Dennis Bonnen; left the Capitol in 2020 and co-founded Second Floor Strategies, a government-relations/lobby firm. Purple Sage Strategies LLC is her own consulting vehicle. Registered Texas lobbyist.

name: Kenyon, Brock
resolved_employer: Director of Acquisitions / VP heading the Austin office of SomeraRoad Inc. (national real-estate investment firm)
evidence: Austin-native Brock Kenyon leads SomeraRoad's Austin office as Director of Acquisitions (St. Elmo Public Market, 801 Barton Springs). Name, employer, city, and 'Real Estate' occupation all match.

name: Margolis, Ellen
evidence: Retired business owner in San Diego (zip 92117) who gave to Krista Laine. Multiple 'Ellen Margolis' exist in San Diego (incl. a psychologist); none can be tied to this donor's zip or former business, so no career identified.

name: Fullerton, William
resolved_employer: SVP Government Affairs, CENTEGIX (school-safety technology company, wearable panic buttons / Alyssa's Law); formerly Chief of Staff at the Texas Education Agency
evidence: William J. Fullerton is SVP of Government Affairs at CENTEGIX, a K-12 school-safety software/hardware firm; prior TEA Chief of Staff and Texas Star Alliance lobbyist. LinkedIn, ZoomInfo and TheOrg confirm name+title+employer.

name: Dominguez, Dorene
resolved_employer: Chairwoman & CEO of Vanir (Vanir Group / Vanir Construction Management & Development), Granite Bay, CA
evidence: Dorene C. Dominguez has been Chairwoman/CEO of Vanir since 2004, a national program/project/construction-management and real-estate-development firm founded by her father. Name, employer, city (Granite Bay 95746) and CEO title match.

name: Hawkins, Tam
resolved_employer: President & CEO, Greater Austin Black Chamber of Commerce (GABC)
evidence: Tam Hawkins is President/CEO of the Greater Austin Black Chamber of Commerce, an East Austin business-advocacy nonprofit; Dallas native, board member of East Austin Conservancy. Distinctive name + Austin + CEO match ('BBGG' on the filing is an unexplained employer string).

name: McDonald, Carol
resolved_employer: President, Independent Colleges and Universities of Texas (ICUT) — higher-education advocacy association
evidence: Carol McDonald served as President of ICUT, the association representing Texas private colleges (testified to the TX Senate higher-ed oversight committee in 2004). 'Association executive' occupation + ICUT employer match.

name: Laas, Rachel Ann
resolved_employer: Loan Officer, Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation (Austin)
evidence: Filing lists her as a loan officer at Fairway Independent Mortgage, which has multiple Austin branches (incl. the 78738 area near her 78739 zip). Distinctive surname and self-reported occupation are consistent, but no individual NMLS/LinkedIn profile was located to confirm.

name: Polombo, Michael
resolved_employer: Principal/Owner of GSD — Greenstar Development, Austin commercial/multifamily real-estate developer
evidence: Michael Polombo founded Greenstar Development (GSD) in 2013; Austin developer of multifamily, office, mixed-use projects (Rise Apartments, The Independent). LinkedIn, ZoomInfo and LoopNet confirm name+GSD+partner/owner role.

name: Smith, Celia
evidence: Occupation and employer both listed as 'Requested' (not disclosed) on the filing. 'Celia Smith' in Austin 78731 is too common to identify without an occupation or employer anchor.

name: Templeton, Toni
resolved_employer: Education-data researcher; Senior Research Scientist at the University of Houston Education Research Center and director/analyst at TTM Analytics LLC
evidence: Dr. Toni B. Templeton is a UH College of Education research scientist and director of TTM Analytics, building quantitative models of Texas public-school outcomes. 'TTM Analyst' occupation matches TTM Analytics exactly; UT-Austin undergrad, PhD UH.
